transcript.text: Hello, Bhavesh ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 12 April 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 2 Adult, 2 Child ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha aapko ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
Achcha, price ka issue tha. Koi baat nahi Bhavesh ji, main definitely usmein help kar sakti hoon. Kya main aapko 10% discount offer karoon taaki aap booking complete kar sakein?
Theek hai, maine 10% discount apply kar diya hai. Aapko ek naya link mil gaya hoga SMS pe. Kya aap ab book kar lenge?
Koi baat nahi, main link bhej deti hoon aapko, jab time mile dekh lena. Theek hai?
